data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: 'Historic peace' underway with Lebanon, says Netanyahu • Iran's Araghchi to begin tour for regional developments • IDF footage reveals Hezbollah using ambulances for terror activity
